title: Local Business Feature: Integiot

content:
Have you wondered what the white discs with the calm pulsing blue LED lights are in the club?

We always like to give a mention to local Edmonton businesses that help us out, and this week we’d like to give a big shout out to Integiot, owned by Ryan Ball.

Ryan installed a great upgraded Wi-Fi system to the club on short notice to handle live scoring and streaming requirements for the Canadian Women’s Team Championships and Canadian Junior Squash Championships. They’ve given us added coverage area with band switching and superior device management to be able to handle far more simultaneous devices than before.

While Integiot can handle many different types of Wi-Fi and security system installations, they also have a really unique system for setting up automatic gardening and aquarium remote maintenance systems. Pretty awesome!

Check out some of Ryan’s work at https://www.integiot.com/
